article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage

briefs.title: BC Liquor Manufacturers Can Deliver Directly to Customers Until June 30, 2027
briefs.summary: BC's liquor and cannabis regulator has extended the rule allowing manufacturers to deliver products directly to retail customers from their on-site store or off-site storage — using their own staff or a third-party delivery service — until June 30, 2027.
briefs.action_required: Check your delivery operations comply with Bulletin 25-03 — sales must still be completed in-store, online, or by phone.

key_dates.label: BC LCRB direct delivery authorization expiry — manufacturer licence extension

briefs.article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage
